title: Verify existing implementation of caching system
description: The caching system implementation already exists with all required components: Redis adapter (src/cache/redisAdapter.ts), in-memory adapter with TTL support (src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts), cache manager with adapter selection (src/cache/cacheManager.ts), and cache middleware (src/middleware/cacheMiddleware.ts). Verification confirms all files are present and properly implemented.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts - LRU cache with TTL support used by memoryAdapter
src/utils/result.ts - Result type for explicit error handling
